tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsEnvironmentsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Environment.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsEnvironmentsList
tools.description: Lists environments in a project.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsExecutionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Execution in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsExecutionsList
tools.description: Lists executions in a given project and location

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Instance in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesGetInstanceHealth
tools.description: Check if a notebook instance is healthy.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesIsUpgradeable
tools.description: Check if a notebook instance is upgradable.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesList
tools.description: Lists instances in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesRegister
tools.description: Registers an existing legacy notebook instance to the Notebooks API server. Legacy instances are instances created with the legacy Compute Engine calls. They are not manageable by the Notebooks API out of the box. This call makes these instances manageable by the Notebooks API.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesReport
tools.description: Allows notebook instances to report their latest instance information to the Notebooks API server. The server will merge the reported information to the instance metadata store. Do not use this method directly.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesRollback
tools.description: Rollbacks a notebook instance to the previous version.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesSetAccelerator
tools.description: Updates the guest accelerators of a single Instance.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesSetLabels
tools.description: Replaces all the labels of an Instance.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesSetMachineType
tools.description: Updates the machine type of a single Instance.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesUpdateConfig
tools.description: Update Notebook Instance configurations.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesUpdateMetadataItems
tools.description: Add/update metadata items for an instance.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesUpdateShieldedInstanceConfig
tools.description: Updates the Shielded instance configuration of a single Instance.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsInstancesUpgradeInternal
tools.description: Allows notebook instances to call this endpoint to upgrade themselves. Do not use this method directly.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Runtime in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesDiagnose
tools.description: Creates a Diagnostic File and runs Diagnostic Tool given a Runtime.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesList
tools.description: Lists Runtimes in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesPatch
tools.description: Update Notebook Runtime configuration.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesRefreshRuntimeTokenInternal
tools.description: Gets an access token for the consumer service account that the customer attached to the runtime. Only accessible from the tenant instance.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesReportEvent
tools.description: Report and process a runtime event.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesReset
tools.description: Resets a Managed Notebook Runtime.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesStart
tools.description: Starts a Managed Notebook Runtime. Perform "Start" on GPU instances; "Resume" on CPU instances See: https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/stop-start-instance https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/suspend-resume-instance

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesStop
tools.description: Stops a Managed Notebook Runtime. Perform "Stop" on GPU instances; "Suspend" on CPU instances See: https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/stop-start-instance https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/suspend-resume-instance

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesSwitch
tools.description: Switch a Managed Notebook Runtime.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsRuntimesUpgrade
tools.description: Upgrades a Managed Notebook Runtime to the latest version.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsSchedulesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Scheduled Notebook in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsSchedulesDelete
tools.description: Deletes schedule and all underlying jobs

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsSchedulesGet
tools.description: Gets details of schedule

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsSchedulesList
tools.description: Lists schedules in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.notebooksProjectsLocationsSchedulesTrigger
tools.description: Triggers execution of an existing schedule.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
